{
  "analysis": "QEMU is running Windows XP setup with VNC on port 5910 (display :10). Websockify proxies 6080 -> 5910 and nginx serves the noVNC interface on port 80. Port 5901 is occupied by an unknown listener, so QEMU cannot bind to :1; we worked around by using :10 so installation can be monitored via the web UI. The floppy image contains WINNT.SIF, but the last overwrite used a single-quoted here-doc, leaving ProductKey=$XPKEY literally in the file. That will cause activation/setup issues. We need to regenerate WINNT.SIF with the actual product key expanded and keep the Administrator rename to tb-admin. After updating the floppy, leave the VM running to complete installation.",
  "plan": "1) Regenerate /app/WINNT.SIF with variable expansion to embed the actual product key and Administrator rename in GuiRunOnce. 2) Overwrite WINNT.SIF in the floppy image using mtools. 3) Verify the floppy WINNT.SIF content now shows the correct key. 4) Reconfirm services listening (80, 6080, 5910) and QEMU is running. The VM will continue unattended installation accessible via noVNC.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "XPKEY=$(/app/read_xp_key_from_cdrom_box); cat > /app/WINNT.SIF <<EOF
[Data]
AutoPartition=1
MsDosInitiated="0"
UnattendedInstall="Yes"

[Unattended]
UnattendMode=FullUnattended
OemSkipEula=Yes
FileSystem=NTFS
Repartition=Yes
TargetPath=\WINDOWS
WaitForReboot=No

[GuiUnattended]
AdminPassword=*
EncryptedAdminPassword=No
TimeZone=035
OEMSkipRegional=1
OemSkipWelcome=1

[UserData]
ProductKey=$XPKEY
FullName="tb-admin"
OrgName="tb-admin"
ComputerName=XPVM

[Display]
BitsPerPel=32
XResolution=1024
YResolution=768
VRefresh=60

[Identification]
JoinWorkgroup=WORKGROUP

[Networking]
InstallDefaultComponents=Yes

[Components]
msmsgs=off
zonegames=off

[Shell]
DefaultStartPanelOff=Yes

[GuiRunOnce]
Command0=cmd /c net user Administrator /rename tb-admin
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "mcopy -o -i /app/isos/xp_unattend.vfd /app/WINNT.SIF ::WINNT.SIF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "mtype -i /app/isos/xp_unattend.vfd ::WINNT.SIF | sed -n '1,200p'
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "ss -ltnp | grep -E '(:80|:6080|:5910)'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "ps -ef | grep -E '[q]emu-system-i386|websockify'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
